ham.subject: Your Subscription Renewal Notice – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello Alex,

We hope you’re enjoying the full capabilities of your Premium plan with CloudSuite. This is a friendly reminder that your subscription is set to renew on 15 May 2026. The renewal fee of $129.99 will be automatically charged to the billing method on file.

If you wish to upgrade, downgrade, or update your billing details, please log in at <URL>.

Thank you for choosing CloudSuite. We look forward to continuing to support your business.

Best regards,
The CloudSuite Team

spam.subject: Urgent: FedEx Delivery Fee Outstanding – Pay Now
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We regret to inform you that your recent FedEx shipment (Tracking #FDX123456789) was not delivered because a delivery fee of $47.50 remains unpaid. To avoid further delays and potential return of the package, please settle the fee within 24 hours. Failure to pay will result in delivery cancellation and additional charges.

Click <URL> to view your invoice and make a secure payment. If you believe this is an error, contact our Customer Support at 1‑800‑123‑4567 immediately.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
FedEx Delivery Services
